ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), ISCHANGED(StageName),NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type,"Feature Update")) , Probability >= 0.25, RecordTypeId <> '012b0000000cfCa', /*Panel Acquisition*/ $Profile.Id <> '00eb0000000oBvcAAE', RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Rank_Ranger", $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps Extended", $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps", $Profile.Name !="SW Billing", $Profile.Name !="SW Billing Extended", NOT(CONTAINS($Profile.Name, 'Integration')), $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Partnership", RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Acquired_Company", NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type,"Upsell")), isblank(Product_Sold_Add_Ons__c ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please make sure to populate the "Product Sold - Add Ons" field to proceed
